cv.name: Duy Khanh
cv.summary_text: Fullstack Developer with over 4 years of experience building high-performance, user-centric web applications. Strong expertise in ReactJS, Next.js, React Native, and PHP (Laravel). Always focused on building Clean Architecture, optimizing performance, and delivering smooth user experiences.

experience.description: Leading core architecture design and optimizing high-performance systems for enterprise clients. Implementing scalable chat infrastructure and optimizing real-time communication. Proficient in: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP. Working with frameworks: Laravel, ReactJS, React Native, EC-CUBE, Next.js.

projects.name: Mama Social Network
projects.description: Social networking platform for Japanese mothers to share parenting experiences from pregnancy through postpartum.
responsibility: Task: Build a multi-feature social system including posts, video sharing, and real-time communication.
Action: Developed reactive UI with Vue.js, Node.js for backend logic, and integrated Socket.io for group/direct chat functionality.
Result: Successful stable system with tens of thousands of monthly uploads; chat latency achieved <200ms.

projects.name: Tsalad Shopify
projects.description: Shopify e-commerce system optimized for conversions and user experience.
responsibility: Task: Build responsive interfaces and optimize website performance.
Action: Implemented Lazy Loading, automatic image compression, and Liquid/CSS optimization.
Result: Increased Google PageSpeed Insight score from 45 to 85+, 15% conversion rate increase.

projects.name: ECCUBE Adwaa
projects.description: A website allowing users to download studio photos with services like printing and album creation.
responsibility: Task: Customizing EC-CUBE core and integrating payment gateway.
Action: Optimized database queries, developed custom SPayment payment plugin.
Result: System handled 1000+ album orders in the first month without downtime.

projects.name: Hire Fire
projects.description: An application connecting employers and employees with a matching model similar to Tinder.
responsibility: Task: Build mobile app UI/UX and real-time chat functionality.
Action: Used Socket.io for chat and Firebase Cloud Messaging for notifications.
Result: Achieved 5000+ downloads within 2 months of launch.

projects.name: Adop Hiroshi App
projects.description: Smart locker unlocking application via Bluetooth BLE.
responsibility: Task: Handle BLE connection and build backend API.
Action: Implemented react-native-ble-manager and developed Laravel backend.
Result: Achieved 99.9% successful unlock rate across 5 major residential complexes.

projects.name: VN Coaching
projects.description: Online course platform with secure video streaming and payment integration.
responsibility: Task: Manage video streaming and secure payment workflows.
Action: Integrated AWS S3/CloudFront and VNPay payment gateway.
Result: Supported 100+ concurrent students, achieved stable revenue growth.

projects.name: Jarmec CTO
projects.description: Medical support application for Parkinson's patients.
responsibility: Task: Develop mobile UI and push notification system.
Action: Built health tracking charts using SVG, optimized notification delivery.
Result: Improved medication adherence rate by up to 90%.

education.description: Graduated with Honors - Department of Management Information Systems.
